content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('staging.visits_delta', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE staging.visits_delta;
GO

CREATE TABLE staging.visits_delta
(
    visit_id        INT           NULL,
    patient_id      INT           NULL,
    visit_date      DATE          NULL,
    source_file     VARCHAR(512)  NULL,
    load_run_id     VARCHAR(100)  NULL,
    created_at_utc  DATETIME2     NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('staging.orders_delta', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE staging.orders_delta;
GO

CREATE TABLE staging.orders_delta
(
    order_id        INT           NULL,
    customer_id     INT           NULL,
    product_id      INT           NULL,
    quantity        INT           NULL,
    order_date      DATE          NULL,
    source_file     VARCHAR(512)  NULL,
    load_run_id     VARCHAR(100)  NULL,
    created_at_utc  DATETIME2     NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO
